data.title: FX Senshi Kurumi-chan
data.synopsis:
When middle school student, Fukuga Kurumi's mother commits suicide after losing 20 million yen in FX trading (Foreign Exchange trading), she vows to recoup the money her mother lost "I'll easily get that much back!"

Now, when she is a university student she makes her long-awaited debut in FX trading, unaware that the world she just entered could turn from heaven to hell in the blink of an eye.

This is a cute and slightly dangerous story as it explains technical terms by thrilling market fluctuations as the chart drives up and down, which becomes more heated with the entry of quirky FX warriors: Yasuko Takane, Mochiko Kogane, and Mebuki Yamashi. Can Kurumi and her friends survive this world with unstoppable heartbeat moments and unrealized losses!?

(Source: MAL News)

data.title: Path of Progress
data.synopsis:
In this animated video, three real-life medical innovations currently in use—each helping save countless lives—are portrayed, showing how advancements in healthcare are enabling safe childbirth and healthy development for children. The animation was produced by A-1 Pictures, one of Japan’s leading studios, and directed by Yuki Morishita.

(Source: Youtube)

titles.title: ワールド イズ ダンシング

data.title: World Is Dancing
data.title_japanese: ワールド イズ ダンシング
data.synopsis:
One does not need dance to live.

In 1374, during the turbulent age when the Northern and Southern Courts were locked in conflict, the Northern Court's shogun, Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, was becoming an increasingly dominant force.

Born the son of Kanami, head of the Kanze troupe of sarugaku performers, Oniyasha drifts through his days with a hazy question lodged in his heart: Why do people dance? His spirit remains clouded, until the day he encounters a dance that is truly "good."

Curious, sensitive, and strikingly beautiful, the boy meets people, laughs, cries, confronts his own weaknesses, and slowly begins to shape a new form of dance for a world steeped in impermanence.

(Source: Shochiku)

data.title: Serenade (2026)
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Serenade by natori. The song was used as the ending theme of the anime [Oshi no Ko] 3rd Season.

titles.title: Doukyo Shiteiru Kensei no Onna Shishou ga Kawaisugite Mainichi Shiawase desu
Is So Cute That I’m Happy Every Day
同居している剣聖の女師匠が可愛すぎて毎日幸せです

data.title: Doukyo Shiteiru Kensei no Onna Shishou ga Kawaisugite Mainichi Shiawase desu
data.title_japanese: 同居している剣聖の女師匠が可愛すぎて毎日幸せです
title_synonyms: Is So Cute That I’m Happy Every Day
data.synopsis:
Eugene Dawson, a lad who aims to get stronger, is currently training under his master, Liza Pulsandra, who is extolled as the Sword Saint. His days are spent happily with his master, who is the strongest in terms of physical strength, but whose private life is a bit of a mess. Or so one would think, but her undefended and erotic body and unconscious physical contact make something like training seem impossible...!? Can he really get stronger like this?

(Source: Kadokawa, translated)

data.title: Onegai AiPri
data.synopsis:
The new anime's story centers on Konomi Inori, a first year middle school student who just moved to the town of Onegai. At the town's plaza, Konomi prayed to the goddess statue to give her a chance to be an AiPri. After she prayed, she accidentally meets the famous AiPri Aoi Yumemiya and a mysterious talking stuffed toy with her named Fortu. It turns out that Fortu is looking for an AiPri who can make their wish come true, and when Konomi opened the special mirror pact that Aoi handed her, she gets the AiPri debut that she prayed for. 

(Source: ANN)

data.title: ReDreaming Angel
data.synopsis:
"U—Universal... superstar idol group's... Dazzling... Dazzling Performance Project..."
"Zzz..."
"Ah! We're here! Wake up already!"
"...Actually, these guys can't really be called a proper audience, can they..."
"But our performance... It's an actual performance now!"

(Source: YouTube)

titles.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Pantan to Yakusoku no Hoshi
それいけ！アンパンマン パンタンと約束の星

data.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Pantan to Yakusoku no Hoshi
data.title_japanese: それいけ！アンパンマン パンタンと約束の星
data.synopsis:
The film will center on a new character named Pantan. Pantan is a red panda who seeks to find the treasure thought to be in a rainbow star in the night sky, in order to keep a promise made to an adventurer long ago. When Pantan and Anpanman encounter each other, Anpanman lends his abilities to help out Pantan.

(Source: ANN)

titles.title: Shishang Zui Qiang Lian Ti Lao Zu
The Strongest Body Refiner in History

data.title: Shishang Zui Qiang Lian Ti Lao Zu
title_synonyms: The Strongest Body Refiner in History
data.synopsis:
Ye Cangxuan, a supreme cultivator of the Body Refining Realm, was once invincible in the mortal world. He easily passed the Ascension Trial and ascended to the Immortal World. There, he learned that his homeland—the Nine Skies Continent—was on the brink of destruction. Without hesitation, Ye Cangxuan chose to return. At the same time, the Six Sects were collapsing. Demons and devils from the Outer Lands were poised to invade, and their spies had already infiltrated the Nine Skies Continent. Determined to change his homeland's fate, Ye Cangxuan embarked on a grueling quest. He reunited the Six Sects, broke into the Barbaric Wastes, wiped out demons and devils, and challenged the immortals themselves. In the end, he stood against the Sky itself.

(Source: Youku)
data.background: Adaptation of Xiaoming Taiji's (小明太极) Chinese webtoon of the same title.

titles.title: Kimi to Hanabi to Yakusoku to

data.title: Kimi to Hanabi to Yakusoku to
data.synopsis:
Set around the Nagaoka Festival Grand Fireworks Show, one of Japan's three major fireworks displays, this story follows two high school students, Makoto and Akira.

Though they live far apart in Tokyo and have never met, their lives are unexpectedly brought together by a single, mysterious painting of a firework. Drawn together by this strange connection, the two grow closer as time runs short. As the festival approaches, Makoto and Akira are faced with a decision that will change their futures forever.

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: ドラゴンボール超 ビルス

data.title: Dragon Ball Super: Beerus
data.title_japanese: ドラゴンボール超 ビルス
data.synopsis:
Dragon Ball Super: Beerus, a project that was started a few years ago, is the newly ENHANCED edition of the anime Dragon Ball Super. ENHANCED by the latest visual expression, every scene, especially the battle scenes, is even more immersive, providing a more faithful and detailed reproduction of the original work by Akira Toriyama, and it will deliver a quality that is sure to fully satisfy audiences.

(Source: Official website)

titles.title: Nippon Sangoku: The Three Nations of the Crimson Sun

data.title: Nippon Sangoku
data.title_english: Nippon Sangoku: The Three Nations of the Crimson Sun
data.synopsis:
In the near future, Japan has completely collapsed due to a mix of nuclear warfare, natural disasters, and widespread corruption that sparked a revolution.

The country is now split into three warring superpowers. This new era of the Three Kingdoms Period sees diplomacy vanish, replaced by a harsh, relentless fight for power. Each territory is using its military strength and resources against the others in a desperate attempt for total control over the remnants of Japanese land.

Aoteru Misumi is a low-ranking official who has stayed in the background for most of his life. He does not come from a prestigious military background or aristocracy, but Misumi has a strong ambition: to end the pointless bloodshed that afflicts the nation. He seeks to unify the fractured country, armed only with sharp insight and a persuasive voice that can rally the people.

The legend of the man who will become a brilliant military strategist starts now.

(Source: MAL News)
data.background: Each episode was streamed two days in advance of the TV broadcast starting on April 5, 2026, on Prime Video. Regular broadcasting began on April 7, 2026.

titles.title: Megami "Isekai Tensei Nani ni Naritai desu ka" Ore "Yuusha no Rokkotsu de"
女神「異世界転生何になりたいですか」俺「勇者の肋骨で」

data.title: Megami "Isekai Tensei Nani ni Naritai desu ka" Ore "Yuusha no Rokkotsu de"
data.title_japanese: 女神「異世界転生何になりたいですか」俺「勇者の肋骨で」
data.synopsis:
The protagonist of the tale, simply referred to as "I," experiences an endless cycle of reincarnation. The narrative takes place in a different universe where people are free to select their next form. However, the waiting list for popular roles, like "Demon King" or "Hero with Cheat Skills and a Harem," has reached 50,000 years due to a recent spike in applications.

The protagonist decides to repeatedly reincarnate into increasingly strange forms because he refuses to wait. These roles include the rib of a hero in charge of a harem, a hermit crab, a vegetable, and even an explosive used to blow up blissfully happy couples.

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: Megami "Isekai Tensei Nani ni Naritai desu ka" Ore "Yuusha no Rokkotsu de"
女神「異世界転生何になりたいですか」俺「勇者の肋骨で」

data.title: Yuan Jing Zhi Dian
data.synopsis:
Yi Wu was thrust onto the World Cup stage because of a single online "like." He then inexplicably appeared in a closed arena, where a countdown was implanted in everyone. To gain time to survive, they had to engage in a new, multi-strategy competition, escape perilous environments, and navigate secret chambers. This unique environment forced them to both cooperate and compete, and behind it all, a legend of a "spiritual kingdom" seemed to be circulating.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

titles.title: Mouse Cursor de Genjitsu wo Sousa Dekiru You ni Natta node, Onna no Ko wo Ippai Click Shima~su
マウスカーソルで現実を操作できるようになったので、女の子をいっぱいクリックしまーす

data.title: Mouse Cursor de Genjitsu wo Sousa Dekiru You ni Natta node, Onna no Ko wo Ippai Click Shima~su
data.title_japanese: マウスカーソルで現実を操作できるようになったので、女の子をいっぱいクリックしまーす
data.synopsis:
What if you could actually use a mouse cursor in real life? Takumi, the nerdy outcast, harbors unrequited feelings for his first love, Mone, who treats him with disdain. During computer class, Takumi discovers that his mouse cursor extends beyond the screen and into the physical world...?! With this newfound power visible only to him, Takumi sees an opportunity for mischief. He uses the cursor to get revenge on Mone, clicking on sensitive areas and reveling in her reactions. But when an "Intercourse" button appears unexpectedly, Takumi is thrust into a reality he never imagined possible..."Intercourse"?! Could this really be...?!

(Source: Coolmic)

titles.title: Kyouran Reijou Nia Liston: Byoujaku Reijou ni Tensei shita Kamigoroshi no Bujin no Karei Naru Musouroku
凶乱令嬢ニア・リストン 病弱令嬢に転生した神殺しの武人の華麗なる無双録

data.title: Kyouran Reijou Nia Liston: Byoujaku Reijou ni Tensei shita Kamigoroshi no Bujin no Karei Naru Musouroku
data.title_japanese: 凶乱令嬢ニア・リストン 病弱令嬢に転生した神殺しの武人の華麗なる無双録
data.synopsis:
Lying on her deathbed with seemingly no chance at recovery, a young Nia Liston is soon to succumb to her illness. Unable to give up hope, her parents desperately search for a cure in even the most obscure places, leading to the appearance of a hooded man claiming he can help rid Nia of her condition. But rather than curing her, the hooded man transplants the soul of a deceased hero who was undefeated in battle into the girl's frail body.

Given a second chance at life as Nia, the hero is determined to recover her new body's strength by using a technique known as chi to target and eliminate the illness at its roots. With her enthusiastic hunger for combat having also been carried over, Nia is eager to return to exploring the world. However, the hero's restless soul yearns to find a worthy opponent who can defeat her on the battlefield, sparking chaos wherever Nia may go.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
